source.name: Swishy website reveal templates
source.license_notes: Use summarized motion patterns only; do not copy template output or assets.

layout_rules: Reveal the shell first, then primary content, then secondary cards and controls.
Use blur and vertical translation for a premium first-load effect, but settle within about one second.
Stagger cards and controls so the page feels assembled rather than dumped onto the screen.
accessibility_notes: Keep content available in DOM immediately.
Under reduced motion, use a short fade without blur/translation.
Avoid making users wait for essential navigation.
implementation_hints: Use opacity 0 to 1, translateY 24-48px to 0, blur 12px to 0px, duration 600-900ms.
Use staggered delays of 80-140ms for card groups.
For Liquid Glass pages, reveal background glow first, then glass panels, then inner controls.

quality.notes: Swishy lists a Website reveal template described as easing and blurring in from the bottom.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use website reveal blur for premium page entry: background glow, glass panels, and controls rise from below while blur resolves, with 600-900ms duration and reduced-motion fallback.
